title: SoCalGuesser Image Classifier
description: Built a convolution neural network to classify Southern California Images for six places. Used transfer learning and achieved 90% test accuracy.

title: Target, Walmart, Whole Foods Price Comparison
description: Created a data visualization suggesting that while Whole Foods have higher average price compared to Target and Walmart, Target have the highest beverage prices by far.

title: California Wild Fire Analysis
description: Analyzed California wild fire over the past 20 years. Found statistically significant evidence that the fire wires are not happening at an increasing rate.

title: League of Legends Vision Analysis
description: Analyzed vision mechanism in Leaguoe of Legends. Found statisically signifiant evidence that blue side tends to have higher vision score than red side which might explain that blue side have higher win rate.

title: Image Processing
description: Built a full-featured multimedia processing system in Python, implementing image transformations (grayscale, rotation, edge detection) and audio effects (reverb, speed/slow adjustments) with object-oriented design.
